sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (name String, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY name;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT name, value FROM hdfsCluster('cluster_simple', 'hdfs://hdfs1:9000/data/*.tsv', 'TSV', 'name String, value UInt32');
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE name = 'example_name';
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > 10;
SELECT name, value FROM hdfsCluster('cluster_simple', 'hdfs://hdfs1:9000/{sample,example}_dir/some_file_{1..5}', 'CSV', 'name String, value UInt32') WHERE value < 100;
